{{Quote|The DC-15s blaster isn't my favorite weapon, but it never runs outta ammo, and that counts for something in a firefight.|Clone Commando [[Sev/Legends|Sev]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic Commando">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref>}}
The '''DC-15s side arm blaster''' was a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] created by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] for the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. DC-15s [[Pistol/Legends|pistols]] were used by [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] as a backup in addition to the heavier [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System]]. The energy cell kept the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] recharging at a slow but steady rate.

==Description==
BlasTech's DC-15s side arm was a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] that fired charged [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] bolts. While not as powerful as regular [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15 blasters]], the DC-15s was handy in close-quarters combat, special forces infiltration operations or when conserving ammo was necessary. The DC-15s had a recharge rate of one round per second and was capable of seven consecutive shots with energy fully recharged; after seven shots, the user had to wait for recharge of energy for at least one shot to fire again.

{{Weapon-stub}}
